name: Chicken Sloppy Joes
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat until hot.
2. Add the ground chicken and cook, stirring occasionally, for 4 to 6 minutes or until no longer pink.
3. Stir in the chopped green bell pepper and onion, and cook for an additional 1 to 3 minutes.
4. Add the canned sloppy joe sauce and cook over medium heat for about 8 to 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Stir in the cooked rice and continue cooking until thoroughly heated.
6. Spoon the mixture onto hamburger buns.
Each serving provides:
439 calories
24 g protein
13 g fat
3 g saturated fat
56 g carbohydrate
2 g dietary fiber
64 mg cholesterol
900 mg sodium
Source: Rice & Chicken - New Ideas for Old Favorites
